title: API Integration- How to get items+column values from specific board view?
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
How can I get items and specific column values from specific board view in 1 query? 
Thank you, 
May

posts.author: qishiwobujide (May)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

How can I get items and specific column values from specific board view in 1 query?

Thank you,
May

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @qishiwobujide and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can use a query like this one:

{
  boards(ids: 123456789) {
    items (limit:50, page: 1) {
      id
      name
      column_values (ids:["status", "date4"]) {
        value
        text
        additional_info
      }
    }
  }
}

You can check out how pagination works here!

Take into account that in this example, I would be getting the data from the columns of ID “status” and “date4”.

Let us know if you have more questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: willt (WillT)
posts.cookedHtml: It may be due to age, but for me when I add “text” to column values for a status column I got 400 error.
